title: eleusine indica
intro: Eleusine indica, also known as goose grass or wire grass, is a type of annual grass native to tropical and subtropical regions of Africa and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eleusine indica include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves and seeds of Eleusine indica can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal uses.
